string_create.tooltip: Create and initialize a variable of type String.

string_char_create.tooltip: Create and initialize a variable of type char.

string_get.tooltip: Return the current value of the selected string variable.

string_length.tooltip: Return the number of characters in a string.

string_concat.tooltip: Return a string formed by joining the two values.

string_char_at.tooltip: Return the character at the specified index in a string.

string_substring.message0: Extracts the substring from position %2 to %3 from the string %1
string_substring.tooltip: Return the part of a string between the start and end indexes.

string_index_of.message0: Find the location of %2 in the string %1
string_index_of.tooltip: Return the first position of the search text, or -1 if it is not found.

string_equals.tooltip: Check whether two strings are exactly equal.

string_to_int.tooltip: Parse a string as an integer.

string_to_float.tooltip: Parse a string as a floating-point number.

string_replace.tooltip: Replace matching text in a string with new text.

string_to_upper.tooltip: Convert the letters in a string to uppercase.

string_to_lower.tooltip: Convert the letters in a string to lowercase.

string_trim.message0: Remove the spaces at both ends of the string %1
string_trim.tooltip: Remove whitespace from the beginning and end of a string.

string_starts_with.tooltip: Check whether a string starts with the specified text.

string_ends_with.tooltip: Check whether a string ends with the specified text.

string_char_literal.tooltip: Create a character value using the first entered character.
